Summary: Verify search bar visibility on homepage
Description: Ensure the search input field is visible in the header section
Test Step:
1. Open https://ghorerbazar.com
2. Locate search input box in header
Expected Result: Search field should be visible and enabled

Summary: Verify search field accepts English text
Description: Validate that the search input accepts English characters
Expected Result: Text should appear in the search input field

Summary: Verify search field accepts Bangla text
Description: Validate that Bangla characters can be typed in search field
Verify relevant products appear when searching with English keywords
Expected Result: Products related to Honey should appear

Description: Verify search functionality works with Bangla keywords

Summary: Search product using mixed Bangla-English keyword
Description: Verify search handles mixed language queries

Summary: Search product using lowercase English keyword
Description: Ensure search works regardless of lowercase input

Summary: Search product using uppercase English keyword
Description: Ensure search is case-insensitive
Verify search works with partial product name
Validate partial Bangla keyword search
Verify system behavior when no products match
Expected Result: System should show 'No products found' message

Description: Ensure numeric values do not break search functionality
Verify system stability with special characters
Expected Result: Search should not crash the system

Description: Verify behavior when search is submitted without text
Test Step:
1. Click search
2. Press Enter without typing
Expected Result: System should show validation or remain on same page

Description: Ensure clicking search icon triggers search
Ensure pressing Enter triggers search
Ensure product names appear in search results

Summary: Verify product images in search results
Description: Ensure images appear correctly in results

Summary: Verify product price visibility in results
Description: Ensure product prices are visible in results

Summary: Verify clicking search result opens product page
Description: Ensure user can open product details from search results
Ensure pagination works if many products found
Ensure search results load quickly
Expected Result: Results should load within acceptable time (<3s)

Summary: Verify search functionality on mobile device
Description: Ensure search works correctly on mobile devices

Description: Validate search works across different browsers
